inputs.label: Base Dissociation Constant (Kb)
inputs.businessContext: Equilibrium constant for the base dissociation reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Equilibrium constant for the base dissociation reaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz ayrışma reaksiyonu için denge sabiti.

inputs.label: Acid Dissociation Constant (Ka)
inputs.businessContext: Equilibrium constant for the conjugate acid. Used if Kb is not provided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Equilibrium constant for the conjugate acid. Used if Kb is not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konjuge asit için denge sabiti. Kb sağlanmadıysa kullanılır.

inputs.label: pKa
inputs.businessContext: Negative base-10 logarithm of Ka. Used if Kb and Ka are not provided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negative base-10 logarithm of Ka. Used if Kb and Ka are not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ka'nın negatif baz-10 logaritması. Kb ve Ka sağlanmadıysa kullanılır.

inputs.label: Ion Product of Water (Kw)
inputs.businessContext: Self-ionization constant of water at 25°C. Used when deriving Kb from Ka.

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-ionization constant of water at 25°C. Used when deriving Kb from Ka.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 25°C'de suyun kendi kendine iyonlaşma sabiti. Kb'yi Ka'dan türetirken kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
